name: odoo-technical-plugins
description: A collection of technical plugins for Odoo development, installed via npx.

plugins.name: odoo-technical-rules
plugins.description: Apply general Odoo technical rules (naming, manifest, views, Python/ORM, security, commits, stable policy) when writing or reviewing Odoo module code.

plugins.name: odoo-lint
plugins.description: Make Python & JS pass Odoo's official linters (test_lint pylint checks + ESLint): SQL-injection, lazy translations, OWL static props/template, and more.
